# Link

A styled anchor element component for navigation links. Supports external links that open in a new tab.

## Import

```jsx
import { Link } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `href` | `string` | - | The URL to link to |
| `external` | `boolean` | `false` | Opens the link in a new tab with `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"` |
| `variant` | `"plain" \| "underline"` | `"plain"` | The visual style variant |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette to use (e.g., `"blue"`, `"red"`) |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The link content |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Link href="/about">About Us</Link>
```

### External link

```jsx
<Link href="https://example.com" external>
  Visit Example.com
</Link>
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<Link href="/docs" colorPalette="blue">
  Documentation
</Link>
```

### Underline variant

```jsx
<Link href="/terms" variant="underline">
  Terms of Service
</Link>
```

### Inline with text

```jsx
<Text>
  Read our <Link href="/privacy" colorPalette="blue" variant="underline">privacy policy</Link> for details.
</Text>
```

## Features

- Renders a styled `<a>` element
- `external` prop automatically adds `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"` for security
- Defaults to `variant="plain"` for a clean look
- Supports color palettes for themed link colors
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for custom styling
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
